title: Child development: gross motor milestones
body_html:
The table below summarises the major social behaviour and play milestones

AgeMilestone
6 weeksSmiles (Refer at 10 weeks)
3 monthsLaughs
Enjoys friendly handling
6 monthsNot shy
9 monthsShy
Takes everything to mouth

Feeding

AgeMilestone
6 monthsMay put hand on bottle when being fed
12 -15 monthsDrinks from cup + uses spoon, develops over 3 month period
2 yearsCompetent with spoon, doesn't spill with cup
3 yearsUses spoon and fork
5 yearsUses knife and fork

Dressing

AgeMilestone
12-15 monthsHelps getting dressed/undressed
18 monthsTakes off shoes, hat but unable to replace
2 yearsPuts on hat and shoes
4 yearsCan dress and undress independently except for laces and buttons

Play

AgeMilestone
9 monthsPlays 'peek-a-boo'
Waves 'bye-bye'
12 monthsPlays 'pat-a-cake'
18 monthsPlays contentedly alone
2 yearsPlays near others, not with them
4 yearsPlays with other children
5
300
